problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Reservoir computing with physical substrate may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
